steps.title: Solve the capacity problem
steps.content: Rail can compete with short-haul flights because it avoids the long lead time of air travel. But the model suggests rail lead times emerge as passenger volumes approach capacity limits, so the solution must expand capacity.

steps.title: Choose the viable fix
steps.content:
• Choice A: Discusses long-haul routes, which are not the problem.
  • Choice B: Adds train capacity, reducing the congestion that creates lead times.
  • Choice C: Adds airline-style procedures, which would create more delay.
  • Choice D: Accepts the loss of rail's advantage rather than preserving it.
The answer is B.
